name: 【システム】01_15-分析-統合ダッシュボードスナップショット_V5

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_orders, SUM(total_amount) as total_revenue, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'shipped' THEN 1 END) as shipped_orders, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending_orders, COUNT(DISTINCT platform) as platforms_count FROM orders_unified WHERE DATE(created_at) = $1

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_products, COUNT(CASE WHEN physical_quantity = 0 THEN 1 END) as out_of_stock, COUNT(CASE WHEN physical_quantity <= 3 AND physical_quantity > 0 THEN 1 END) as low_stock, SUM(physical_quantity * COALESCE(cost_price, 0)) as inventory_value FROM inventory_master

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN priority = 'high' THEN 1 END) as high_priority, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending_tasks, COUNT(CASE WHEN task_type = 'inquiry' THEN 1 END) as inquiry_count FROM admin_tasks WHERE DATE(created_at) = $1

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_listed, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 END) as active_listings, AVG(CASE WHEN listing_price > 0 THEN (listing_price - COALESCE(cost_price,0)) / listing_price * 100 END) as avg_margin FROM products_master WHERE status IN ('active', 'listed')

INSERT INTO performance_snapshots (snapshot_date, sales_data, inventory_data, tasks_data, listings_data, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb, $3::jsonb, $4::jsonb, $5::jsonb, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (snapshot_date) DO UPDATE SET sales_data = EXCLUDED.sales_data, inventory_data = EXCLUDED.inventory_data, tasks_data = EXCLUDED.tasks_data, listings_data = EXCLUDED.listings_data, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id

nodes.name: 💾 スナップショット保存

parameters.name: body
parameters.value:
=[info][title]⚠️ 在庫アラート[/title]在庫切れ: {{ $json.inventory.out_of_stock }}件

parameters.name: body
parameters.value:
=[info][title]📊 日次レポート ({{ $json.snapshot_date }})[/title]【売上】
注文数: {{ $json.sales.total_orders }}件
売上: ${{ $json.sales.total_revenue }}
出荷済: {{ $json.sales.shipped_orders }}件

【在庫】
総商品: {{ $json.inventory.total_products }}件
在庫切れ: {{ $json.inventory.out_of_stock }}件

【タスク】
未処理: {{ $json.tasks.pending_tasks }}件
高優先: {{ $json.tasks.high_priority }}件

【出品】
アクティブ: {{ $json.listings.active_listings }}件
平均利益率: {{ Math.round($json.listings.avg_margin) }}%[/info]

parameters.jsCode:
const snapshot = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, snapshot_date: snapshot.snapshot_date, summary: { orders: snapshot.sales.total_orders, revenue: snapshot.sales.total_revenue, out_of_stock: snapshot.inventory.out_of_stock, pending_tasks: snapshot.tasks.pending_tasks, active_listings: snapshot.listings.active_listings } } }];
